execution_boundary.summary: Legal obligations inform execution governance but do not directly emit runtime verdicts.

preparation_boundary.summary: Pre-deployment and preparation obligations can affect whether a transition is admissible.

commitment_boundary.summary: Regulatory obligations can become policy references for commit-time review.

semantic_equivalence_boundary.summary: Equivalent use cases require regulatory classification and policy mapping.

unknown_trajectory_boundary.summary: Unknown or high-risk use requires classification, documentation, oversight, or fail-closed handling.

authority_boundary.summary: Regulatory reference is not execution authority inside StegVerse.

evidence_freshness_boundary.summary: Current legal status, jurisdiction, and system classification matter.

reconstruction_boundary.summary: Documentation obligations can support reconstruction if tied to evidence and policy references.

interoperability_path.summary: EU AI Act maps into obligations, documentation, oversight, and legal-policy review dimensions.

next_required_action: add EU AI Act obligation-mapping fixture for documentation and oversight dimensions
